training_status: lifting (took time off due to injury)

benefits.description: Chronic right anterior delt pain from overuse tear significantly reduced. Pain went from constant 24/7 for 5 months to occasional, with several pain-free days. No longer experiences pain when sleeping on the shoulder.
Anti-inflammatory effect noticed within first couple days of cycle

protocol_notes: Intramuscular injection into right side deltoid. Also did physical therapy daily, took several weeks off serious lifting, 2 weeks off work. Supplemented with CBD and magnesium oil. 2 weeks post-cycle at time of report.
